---
title: "06-EDA-respondents"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(survey)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
respondents_sf <- st_as_sf(respondents, coords = c("h_geography_x", "h_geography_y"), crs = st_crs(census_tracts))
```

```{r}
respondents_long_outcome_score <- respondents %>% 
  dplyr::select(interview_id, fexp_final, CTUID, "h_geography_x", "h_geography_y",
         FewJobs, DeclineEmployment, 
         EasyToGo, TravelTooLong) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("FewJobs", "DeclineEmployment", "EasyToGo", "TravelTooLong"),
               names_to = "outcome_score", values_to = "score") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>% 
  mutate(outcome = case_when(outcome_score == "FewJobs" ~ "Few jobs",
                             outcome_score == "DeclineEmployment" ~ "Declined employment",
                             outcome_score == "EasyToGo" ~ "Easy to reach job",
                             outcome_score == "TravelTooLong" ~ "Travel to work too long"))

respondents_long_outcome_likert <- respondents %>% 
  dplyr::select(interview_id, 
         FewJobs_Likert, DeclineEmployment_Likert, 
         EasyToGo_Likert, TravelTooLong_Likert) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("FewJobs_Likert", "DeclineEmployment_Likert", "EasyToGo_Likert", "TravelTooLong_Likert"),
               names_to = "outcome_raw", values_to = "likert") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(likert)) %>% 
  mutate(outcome = case_when(outcome_raw == "FewJobs_Likert" ~ "Few jobs",
                             outcome_raw == "DeclineEmployment_Likert" ~ "Declined employment",
                             outcome_raw == "EasyToGo_Likert" ~ "Easy to reach job",
                             outcome_raw == "TravelTooLong_Likert" ~ "Travel to work too long"))

respondents_long_outcome <- respondents_long_outcome_score %>% 
  left_join(respondents_long_outcome_likert, by = c("interview_id", "outcome")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(outcome_raw, outcome_score)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(interview_id, fexp_final, CTUID,  outcome, score, likert, "h_geography_x", "h_geography_y") %>% 
  mutate(likert = factor(likert))

  
respondents_long_outcome_score_sf <- st_as_sf(respondents_long_outcome, 
                                        coords = c("h_geography_x", "h_geography_y"), crs = st_crs(census_tracts))

respondents_long_outcome_score_sf %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = census_divisions, fill = "white") +   
  geom_sf(aes(color = score), size = 0.1, alpha = 0.4) +          
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  facet_wrap(~outcome , ncol = 2) + 
  labs(size = "Weight", color = "Agreement") +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_sf()

```

```{r}
Likert_order <- c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral", "Positive", "Most Positive")

my_colors_likert <- c("#d7191c", "#fdae61", "#bababa", "#a6d96a", "#1a9641")
names(my_colors_likert) <- Likert_order

respondents_long_outcome_score_sf %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = census_divisions, fill = "white") +   
  geom_sf(aes(color = likert, size = fexp_final), alpha = 0.4) +          
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  facet_wrap(~outcome , ncol = 2) + 
  labs(size = "Weight", color = "Perception") +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_sf()
```

```{r}
outcome_means <- respondents_long_outcome_score %>%
  group_by(CTUID, outcome) %>%
  summarise(mean_score = weighted.mean(score, w = fexp_final, na.rm = TRUE))

outcome_means_sf <- outcome_means %>% 
  left_join(census_tracts, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  st_as_sf(crs = st_crs(census_tracts))

outcome_means_sf %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = census_divisions, fill = "white") +   
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_score), color = NA) + 
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  facet_wrap(~outcome , ncol = 2) + 
  labs(color = "Agreement") +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_sf()
```

```{r}
outcome_likert_proportions <- respondents_long_outcome %>%
  group_by(CTUID, outcome, likert) %>%
  summarise(weighted_count = sum(fexp_final, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(CTUID, outcome) %>%
  mutate(total_weight = sum(weighted_count),
         proportion = weighted_count / total_weight) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(CTUID, outcome, likert, proportion)

outcome_likert_proportions_sf <- outcome_likert_proportions %>% 
  left_join(census_tracts, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  st_as_sf(crs = st_crs(census_tracts))

outcome_likert_proportions_sf %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = census_divisions, fill = "white") +   
  geom_sf(aes(fill = proportion), color = NA) + 
  facet_wrap(~outcome+likert, ncol = 5) + 
  labs(color = "Agreement") +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_sf()
```
```{r}
mode_likert_outcome <- respondents_long_outcome %>%
  group_by(CTUID, outcome, likert) %>%
  summarise(weighted_count = sum(fexp_final, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(CTUID, outcome) %>%
  slice_max(weighted_count, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(CTUID, outcome, mode_likert = likert, weighted_count)

mode_likert_outcome_sf <- mode_likert_outcome %>% 
  left_join(census_tracts, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  st_as_sf(crs = st_crs(census_tracts))

mode_likert_outcome_sf %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = census_divisions, fill = "white") +   
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mode_likert), color = NA) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  facet_wrap(~outcome, ncol = 2) + 
  labs(fill = "Perception") +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_sf()

```

# Boxplots 

```{r}
long_outcomes <- respondents %>%
  dplyr::select(interview_id, fexp_final,
         FewJobs_Likert, DeclineEmployment_Likert, 
         EasyToGo_Likert, TravelTooLong_Likert) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("_Likert"), names_to = "outcome_raw", values_to = "response") %>%
  filter(!is.na(response)) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(outcome_raw == "FewJobs_Likert" ~ "Few jobs accessible",
    outcome_raw == "DeclineEmployment_Likert" ~ "Declined employment",
    outcome_raw == "EasyToGo_Likert" ~ "Easy to reach",
    outcome_raw == "TravelTooLong_Likert" ~ "Travel too long"))
```


```{r}
sa_pp_long <- respondents %>%
  dplyr::select(interview_id, starts_with("SA_pp_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("SA_pp_"),
    names_to = "mode_raw",
    values_to = "measure_value")%>%
  mutate(mode = case_when(mode_raw == "SA_pp_Active" ~ "Active",
                          mode_raw == "SA_pp_Bike" ~ "Cycling",
                          mode_raw == "SA_pp_Walk" ~ "Walk",
                          mode_raw == "SA_pp_Transit" ~ "Transit",
                          mode_raw == "SA_pp_Car_motor" ~ "Car",
                          mode_raw == "SA_pp_General" ~ "General"), 
         measure = "SA_pp")

sa_long <- respondents %>%
  dplyr::select(interview_id, SA_Bike, SA_Walk , SA_Car_motor, SA_Transit, SA_Active, SA_General) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("SA_"),
    names_to = "mode_raw",
    values_to = "measure_value")%>%
  mutate(mode = case_when(mode_raw == "SA_Active" ~ "Active",
                          mode_raw == "SA_Bike" ~ "Cycling",
                          mode_raw == "SA_Walk" ~ "Walk",
                          mode_raw == "SA_Transit" ~ "Transit",
                          mode_raw == "SA_Car_motor" ~ "Car",
                          mode_raw == "SA_General" ~ "General"), 
         measure = "SA")

ht_long <- respondents %>%
  dplyr::select(interview_id, starts_with("HT_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("HT_"),
    names_to = "mode_raw",
    values_to = "measure_value")%>%
  mutate(mode = case_when(mode_raw == "HT_Active" ~ "Active",
                          mode_raw == "HT_Bike" ~ "Cycling",
                          mode_raw == "HT_Walk" ~ "Walk",
                          mode_raw == "HT_Transit" ~ "Transit",
                          mode_raw == "HT_Car_motor" ~ "Car",
                          mode_raw == "HT_General" ~ "General"), 
         measure = "HT")

measures_long <- rbind(sa_pp_long, sa_long, ht_long)
```


```{r}
plot_data <- long_outcomes %>%
  inner_join(measures_long, by = "interview_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(response), !is.na(measure_value), ) %>%
  mutate(response = factor(response, levels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral", "Positive", "Most Positive")))

design <- svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~fexp_final, data = plot_data)
```

```{r}
weighted_boxplot_stats <- function(subset_design) {
  quantiles <- svyby(~measure_value, by = ~ mode + outcome + response + measure, 
                     design = subset_design, 
                     FUN = svyquantile, 
                     quantiles = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
                     na.rm = TRUE, 
                     keep.var = FALSE, 
                     ci = FALSE)
  
  quantiles_df <- quantiles %>%
    dplyr::rename(ymin = "1", 
                  lower = "2", 
                  middle = "3",
                  upper = "4",
                  ymax = "5") %>% 
  return(quantiles_df)
}

box_stats <- weighted_boxplot_stats(design)
```

```{r}
outcome_order_linear <- c("Travel too long", 
                          "Easy to reach", 
                          "Declined employment", 
                          "Few jobs accessible")
my_colors_linear <- c("#66c2a5", "#fc8d62", "#8da0cb", "#e78ac3")
names(my_colors_linear) <- outcome_order_linear

box_stats$outcome <- factor(box_stats$outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear)
```


```{r}
SA_pp_outcomes_boxplots <- box_stats %>% 
  filter(mode %in% c("Active","Transit","Car"), 
         measure == "SA_pp") %>%
ggplot(aes(x = response, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(lower = lower, upper = upper, middle = middle, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
               stat = "identity", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.7, linewidth = 0.20, color = "grey20" ) +
  facet_wrap(~mode, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  labs(x = "Perception group",
    y = "SA_pp (job spatial availability per person)",
    fill = "Outcome") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "SA_pp_outcomes_boxplots.png"),
       plot = SA_pp_outcomes_boxplots,
       width = 15,
       height = 15,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"SA_pp_outcomes_boxplots.png"))
```

```{r}
HT_outcomes_boxplots <- box_stats %>% 
  filter(mode %in% c("Active","Transit","Car"), 
         measure == "HT") %>%
ggplot(aes(x = response, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(lower = lower, upper = upper, middle = middle, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
               stat = "identity", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.7, linewidth = 0.20, color = "grey20" ) +
  facet_wrap(~mode, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  labs(x = "Perception group",
    y = "Job accessibility (Hansen)",
    fill = "Outcome") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "HT_outcomes_boxplots.png"),
       plot = HT_outcomes_boxplots,
       width = 15,
       height = 15,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"HT_outcomes_boxplots.png"))
```

```{r}
SA_outcomes_boxplots <- box_stats %>% 
  filter(mode %in% c("Active","Transit","Car"), 
         measure == "SA") %>%
ggplot(aes(x = response, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(lower = lower, upper = upper, middle = middle, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
               stat = "identity", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.7, linewidth = 0.20, color = "grey20" ) +
  facet_wrap(~mode, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  labs(x = "Perception group",
    y = "Job Spatial Availability",
    fill = "Outcome") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "SA_outcomes_boxplots.png"),
       plot = SA_outcomes_boxplots,
       width = 15,
       height = 15,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"SA_outcomes_boxplots.png"))
```


```{r}
SA_pp_transit_boxplots <- box_stats %>% 
  filter(mode %in% c("Transit"), 
         measure == "SA_pp") %>%
ggplot(aes(x = response, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(lower = lower, upper = upper, middle = middle, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
               stat = "identity", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.7, linewidth = 0.20, color = "grey20" ) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  labs(x = "Perception group",
    y = "Job spatial availability per person (by public transit)",
    fill = "Outcome") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "SA_pp_transit_boxplots.png"),
       plot = SA_pp_transit_boxplots,
       width = 13,
       height = 13,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"SA_pp_transit_boxplots.png"))
```



```{r}
SA_transit_boxplots <- box_stats %>% 
  filter(mode %in% c("Transit"), 
         measure == "SA") %>%
ggplot(aes(x = response, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(lower = lower, upper = upper, middle = middle, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
               stat = "identity", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.7, linewidth = 0.20, color = "grey20" ) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  labs(x = "Perception group",
    y = "Job spatial availability (by public transit)",
    fill = "Outcome") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "SA_transit_boxplots.png"),
       plot = SA_transit_boxplots,
       width = 13,
       height = 13,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"SA_transit_boxplots.png"))
```


```{r}
HT_transit_boxplots <- box_stats %>% 
  filter(mode %in% c("Transit"), 
         measure == "HT") %>%
ggplot(aes(x = response, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(lower = lower, upper = upper, middle = middle, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
               stat = "identity", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.7, linewidth = 0.20, color = "grey20" ) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  labs(x = "Perception group",
    y = "Job accessibility (Hansen type, by public transit)",
    fill = "Outcome") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "HT_transit_boxplots.png"),
       plot = HT_transit_boxplots,
       width = 13,
       height = 13,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"HT_transit_boxplots.png"))
```
